response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to PagerDuty

## Free/Low-Cost Options

**Grafana OnCall**
- Free tier available
- Open-source option
- Good integration with monitoring tools
- ~$9-25/user/month (paid tiers)

**Opsgenie (by Atlassian)**
- Free tier (up to 5 team members)
- Simpler feature set
- ~$10-29/user/month (paid)

**ilert**
- Free plan available
- ~$6-14/user/month
- Good escalation policies

**Incident.io**
- Focuses on incident response
- Mid-tier pricing (~$500+/month)
- More specialized than on-call

## Budget Options

| Tool | Free Tier | Paid Starting | Best For |
|------|-----------|---------------|----------|
| **Squadcast** | Limited | ~$49/month | Small teams |
| **OnPage** | No | ~$30/user/month | Enterprise features |
| **Splunk On-Call** | 7-day free trial | ~$29/user/month | Splunk ecosystem |
| **Big Panda** | No | Custom pricing | Enterprise |

## DIY Alternatives

- **Twilio + custom scripts** - Build your own alerting
- **Alertmanager** (Prometheus) - Open-source, self-hosted
- **n8n/Zapier** - Workflow automation for simpler needs

## Key Considerations

- **Team size** - affects per-user costs
- **Integration needs** - some tools integrate better with your stack
- **Features needed** - escalation, analytics, automation depth
- **Self-hosted vs. SaaS** - open-source options save monthly costs

What's your primary use case? That would help narrow recommendations.
